  mediawiki/extensions/CommunityConfigurationExample

########################################
docker run \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src_3:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/EventBus \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bookworm-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/EventStreamConfig

  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src_3:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/Kartographer \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bookworm-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/JsonConfig mediawiki/extensions/FlaggedRevs mediawiki/extensions/ParserFunctions mediawiki/extensions/VisualEditor mediawiki/extensions/WikimediaMessages

########################################
docker run \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src_3:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/PageTriage \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bookworm-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/Echo mediawiki/extensions/ORES mediawiki/extensions/PageViewInfo mediawiki/extensions/WikiLove

  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/CampaignEvents mediawiki/extensions/cldr
